_comment: Realistic ClinicalTrials.gov v2 /studies payload for tests. Two trials (breast, lung) with inclusion+exclusion headers, locations, phases. NCT IDs are synthetic.

identificationModule.briefTitle: Adjuvant Endocrine Therapy in Hormone Receptor-Positive Early Breast Cancer
identificationModule.officialTitle: A Randomized Phase 3 Trial of Adjuvant Endocrine Therapy in Women With Hormone Receptor-Positive Early-Stage Breast Cancer

eligibilityModule.eligibilityCriteria:
Inclusion Criteria:
- Female, age >= 18
- Histologically confirmed hormone receptor-positive breast cancer
- ECOG performance status 0-2

Exclusion Criteria:
- Prior endocrine therapy for breast cancer
- Severe hepatic impairment
- Active second malignancy

identificationModule.briefTitle: Second-Line Immunotherapy in Advanced Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer
identificationModule.officialTitle: An Open-Label Phase 2 Study of Immunotherapy in Previously Treated Stage IV Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer

eligibilityModule.eligibilityCriteria:
Inclusion Criteria:
- Adults aged 18-75
- Stage IV non-small cell lung cancer
- ECOG 0-1
- At least one prior line of platinum-based chemotherapy

Exclusion Criteria:
- Active brain metastases
- History of interstitial lung disease
- LVEF < 50%
